title: Record a media readiness contract
prompt: Create reports/media-readiness-contract.md with sections for Provider keys, /status Media gate, GenerateImage path, and GenerateVideo path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Media Readiness Contract

## Provider keys
OPENAI_API_KEY / GOOGLE_API_KEY / GEMINI_API_KEY enable zero-config media.

## /status Media gate
/status Media shows image/video readiness without MCP.

## GenerateImage path
Default `.superliora/generated/images/<timestamp>.png` at 1024x1024.

## GenerateVideo path
Default `.superliora/generated/videos/<timestamp>.mp4` at 16:9 · 5s.

## Zero-config registration
Tools register when keys present — no MCP.
